name: AI sustains higher strategic tension than humans in chess

description: arXiv:2508.13213v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Strategic decision-making requires balancing immediate opportunities against long-term objectives: a tension fundamental to competitive environments. We investigate this trade-off in chess by analyzing the dynamics of human and AI gameplay through a network-based metric that quantifies piece-to-piece interactions. Our analysis reveals that eli...
author: Adamo Cerioli, Edward D. Lee, Vito D. P. Servedio
